title: Eazifeed Tomato Feed 500ml
features: A brilliantly strong tomato feed with magnesium and other trace elements to get the best out of your crops.
Will make up to 500 litres of feed.
Suitable for tomatoes grown in all conditions.
description: Product description Directions Dilute 1 part of the concentrate with 1000 parts of water before using it for your tomatoes. Safety Warning General safety warnings apply, including wearing protective clothing, washing hands after use, keeping out of reach of children and pets, and adhering to general fertilizer safety guidelines.
